title: Overcooked
description: Get burned out food to forge smokin’ strong blocks! Use ashes to make reinforced blocks.
body:
**Overcooked: In this mod, overcook food to get either regular ashes or Golden Ashes (from burning golden apples and carrots). Use these to craft Reinforced Blocks or Strongly Reinforced Blocks, adding extra durability to vanilla blocks. Reinforced Blocks are made with regular ashes, while Golden Ashes allow for crafting Strongly Reinforced Blocks, ideal for fortifying your base with a unique look. Cook, burn, and build stronger than ever!**


 

**To obtain ashes in Overcooked, follow these steps based on the type of ash you need**:

**Regular Ash**: Cook any of the following pre-cooked items: Cooked Mutton, Cooked Pork, Cooked Rabbit, Cooked Beef, Cooked Chicken, or Cookies. Regular Ash is used to craft Reinforced Blocks for enhanced block durability.

**Golden Ash**: Cook any of the following golden items: Golden Apple, Enchanted Golden Apple, or Golden Carrot. Golden Ash is used to craft Strongly Reinforced Blocks, offering maximum strength for fortified builds.

 

You can craft two types of reinforced blocks to enhance your building experience:

**Reinforced Stone**: Crafted using Regular Ash, this block adds extra durability to standard stone, making it ideal for fortifying your structures.

![RS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c80355837a6fea600c3ab5a0933114fb453b06f6_0.webp)



**Strongly Reinforced Stone**: Created with Golden Ash, this block provides even greater strength and resilience against explosions and player damage.

![SRS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d18d77712f8f83340e9888f67111dc90c0daa7c_0.webp)



**Reinforced Obsidian**: Available by using Regular Ash, this block offers a formidable upgrade to regular obsidian, adding significant durability.

![RO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd70b6d4c01f5b271d4a71617e9cfd786ccc1759.png)



**Strongly Reinforced Obsidian**: For ultimate defense, craft this block with Golden Ash. It boasts exceptional durability, perfect for creating secure bases or vaults in your Minecraft world.

![SRO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7e5057ea47bdf6afa6ff4018f867d5b04178bd9.png)
